originalTitle: At $549, Lenovo’s Legion Go S gaming handheld is suddenly a good deal
summary: This week, the Steam Deck OLED with 512GB of storage went from $549 to $789, putting it even further out of reach for those who were considering getting one as they came back in stock after months of unavailability. I consider it a tiny consolation that there’s a decent PC gaming handheld that is currently […]
content: This week, the Steam Deck OLED with 512GB of storage went from $549 to $789, putting it even further out of reach for those who were considering getting one as they came back in stock after months of unavailability. I consider it a tiny consolation that there’s a decent PC gaming handheld that is currently selling at its old price. The Lenovo Legion Go S is currently $549.99 at Woot (originally $729.99). It’s the kind of deal that wouldn’t have stood out as much a year ago as it does now. [Product: Lenovo Legion Go S | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://computers.woot.com/offers/new-lenovo-legion-go-s-mobile-gaming-console] We didn’t particularly like the Legion Go S at launch, though part of that was due to its high price. Sean loved its gorgeous 8-inch 120Hz screen and noted that its ergonomics are superior to most gaming handhelds, including the Steam Deck. But the price didn’t make sense considering it didn’t perform as well as Valve’s handheld in some (but not all) games. Also, it launched when Windows 11 was a nightmare to traverse in handheld mode, though things have improved a bit since then. The Legion Go S isn’t a device we can wholeheartedly recommend, but I’m willing to make an exception in silly times like these. I’d be happier to recommend the Ryzen Z1 Extreme processor-packed version of the Go S — we found its performance gains are anywhere from 10 percent to 40 percent improved over the Ryzen Z2 Go, depending on the game — but absolutely not at its current $1,452.99 price at Lenovo’s site. Read our review of the Legion Go S.
chineseTitle: 联想的 Legion Go S 游戏手持机售价 549 美元，突然变得很划算
chineseSummary: 本周，具有 512GB 存储空间的 Steam Deck OLED 从 549 美元涨到了 789 美元，对于那些正在考虑购买的人来说，这更加遥不可及，因为在几个月的缺货后，它们又重新有货了。我认为目前有一款不错的 PC 游戏掌上电脑是一个小小的安慰 […]
chineseContent: 本周，具有 512GB 存储空间的 Steam Deck OLED 从 549 美元涨到了 789 美元，对于那些正在考虑购买的人来说，这更加遥不可及，因为在几个月的缺货后，它们又重新有货了。我认为有一个像样的电脑游戏掌上电脑目前以旧价格出售是一个小小的安慰。联想 Legion Go S 目前在 Woot 的售价为 549.99 美元（原价 729.99 美元）。这种交易在一年前不会像现在那么引人注目。 [产品：联想Legion Go S | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://computers.woot.com/offers/new-lenovo-legion-go-s-mobile-gaming-console]我们在推出时并不特别喜欢Legion Go S，尽管部分原因是其高昂的价格。 Sean 喜欢其华丽的 8 英寸 120Hz 屏幕，并指出其人体工学优于大多数游戏手持设备，包括 Steam Deck。但考虑到它在某些（但不是全部）游戏中的表现不如 Valve 掌机，这个价格没有意义。此外，它推出时，Windows 11 在手持模式下运行简直是一场噩梦，不过从那时起情况已经有所改善。 Legion Go S 不是一款我们可以全心推荐的设备，但我愿意在这样的愚蠢时刻破例。我更乐意推荐搭载 Ryzen Z1 Extreme 处理器的 Go S 版本——我们发现它的性能比 Ryzen Z2 Go 提高了 10% 到 40%，具体取决于游戏——但绝对不是联想网站上目前 1,452.99 美元的价格。阅读我们对 Legion Go S 的评论。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
